message:
feat(kernel-cpu,autograd): add property-based tests for kernel ops and gradient computation

Add proptest-driven property tests to ft-kernel-cpu (neg self-inverse,
exp/log round-trip, sum-reduction correctness, softmax-sums-to-one) and
ft-autograd (add gradient is ones, mul gradient is cross, backward
determinism, relu gradient matches indicator). These complement existing
unit tests with randomised coverage over continuous input ranges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,5 +7,8 @@ license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 [dependencies]
 ft-core = { workspace = true }
 
+[dev-dependencies]
+proptest = "1.6.0"
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
